creator: mzs_47@yahoo.co.in
text:
I now think this port might be unnecessary when we already have a port which does the same but with less dependencies converters/dosunix and this port might cause confusion/conflict with the USES flag unix2dos.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/uses-dos2unix.html

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/slow-patch.html#slow-patch-automatic-replacements
